intent: process the first sample with scanpy

blocks.text: I'll process the first sample (Patient 145, Day 0) with scanpy — QC, filtering, normalization, HVG selection, PCA, and Leiden clustering with UMAP visualization.

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "scrna-qc-clustering", "body": "scRNA-seq QC+clustering (scanpy): read 10x; calculate_qc_metrics; filter n_genes>=200 & pct_mito<0.20; normalize_total(1e4)+log1p; highly_variable_genes; pca; neighbors; umap; leiden; rank_genes_groups. Plots: HVG plot and PCA variance side-by-side; UMAP colored by leiden; use sc.pl.* not hand-rolled matplotlib."}

blocks.text: Now I'll show you the plan before processing:

input.title: QC and clustering of GSM5746259 (Patient 145, Day 0)
input.summary: Standard scanpy pipeline: load sample, QC metrics, filter, normalize, HVG, PCA, UMAP, Leiden clustering, and marker genes.

steps.title: Load first sample from combined object
steps.description: Extract GSM5746259 (Patient_145_Day0) from the registered dataset

steps.title: Calculate QC metrics
steps.description: Compute n_genes, n_counts, pct_mito per cell using sc.pp.calculate_qc_metrics

steps.title: Filter cells and genes
steps.description: Remove cells with n_genes<200 or pct_mito>0.20; remove genes expressed in <3 cells

steps.title: Normalize and log-transform
steps.description: Library-size normalize to 1e4 counts/cell, then log1p transform

steps.title: Highly variable genes (HVG)
steps.description: Select ~2000 HVGs and generate HVG plot

steps.title: PCA
steps.description: Compute PCA on HVGs; generate variance explained plot

steps.title: Neighborhood graph & UMAP
steps.description: Build kNN graph (neighbors); compute UMAP layout

steps.title: Leiden clustering
steps.description: Cluster using Leiden algorithm; generate UMAP colored by cluster

steps.title: Marker genes
steps.description: Compute cluster-marker genes using Wilcoxon test; generate heatmap of top markers

assumptions: Using the registered dataset (GSE192391_first_two_samples) and extracting GSM5746259
Filtering thresholds: n_genes ≥ 200, pct_mito < 20%, genes in ≥ 3 cells
